requiredTopSections.label: 今天已完成的任務
requiredTopSections.purpose: Give the user immediate status context before asking for more decisions.

requiredTopSections.label: 今天目前還在進行中的待辦任務
requiredTopSections.purpose: Help the user decide whether to follow up, change status, or add a next step.

removedSections.label: 確認規則
removedSections.reason: This section is explanatory only and cannot be confirmed or changed by the user.

dataBoundary: Task lists must be generated from the current project only. Do not copy task data between projects.
